{{Infobox character
| name = Priest of Night
| aliases = the Priest of Night
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Priest of Night
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Priest of Night is an individual who viewed it as his responsibility to free the [[Free Worlds]] from the guardianship of the Advocates. He utilized a connection to the [[Aether]] to uncover secrets and locate specific targets, which he used to orchestrate punishments. His actions included using explosives to destroy a home, an event that caused significant distress for those involved. During a recorded message, he expressed a belief that pain is a necessary catalyst for change and claimed to have completed his objective before finalizing his communication. His [[life]] ended abruptly when a scarred, muscular rabbit-like warrior killed him by breaking his neck.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Priest of Night was responsible for an attempted bombing that ultimately resulted in the destruction of [[Starhammer]]'s home. This individual was also linked to discussions regarding the potential redemption of [[Starhammer]], a figure who eventually mentioned the Priest by name. Despite having plans that were somehow discovered by [[Starhammer]]'s savior, the Priest of Night met their end at the hands of a warrior-rabbit.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Priest of Night]] was killed by a warrior-rabbit.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1">''The Engineer'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Priest of Night]] had plans that [[Starhammer]]'s savior somehow knew about.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Priest of Night]] is a person mentioned in relation to [[Starhammer]]'s potential redemption.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Priest of Night]] is mentioned by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Priest of Night]] was involved in an attempted bombing of [[Starhammer]]'s home.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42">''The Engineer'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Priest of Night]] blew up [[Starhammer]]'s home.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“…then the Priest of Night blew up your home.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
